hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^\s*(grep|php -l|go test|phpcs|cat|head|tail|wc|stat|file|ls|which|type|pwd|realpath|dirname|basename|uname|id|env|printenv|jq|xmllint|yamllint|bat|fd|eza)\b' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '[|;&]'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi
